visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun is sitting at a wooden desk with drawers. She is wearing a cream-colored zip-up jacket. She holds a pen in her left hand and is writing in a large open workbook. The background shows stacked storage units and electronic equipment. (2) Close-up shot of her left hand writing on the page. The desk support is positioned on the right side, leaving her left arm suspended in the air without support. She shifts her posture and appears visibly fatigued. (3) Macro shot of her left hand. As she writes from left to right, her pinky finger and the side of her hand drag across the freshly written ink, causing the blue ink to smudge onto her skin. (4) Scene transitions to a kitchen or buffet area. A stainless steel thermal soup pot is open. A person holds a ladle that has a pouring spout oriented for right-handed users. The woman attempts to pour yellow curry soup into a small black bowl using her left hand, which requires an awkward wrist twist. (5) Final phase shows the woman sitting at a dining table next to another person. She is eating noodles from a container with chopsticks in her left hand, while the neighbor uses their right hand. Their elbows repeatedly bump into each other in the shared space.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV:左撇子被欺負日常. (2) [Subtitle]: (懸空的手臂). (3) [Variety]: (痠) (痠) (痠) (痠). (4) [Slogan]: 酷刑椅. (5) [Slogan]: 水性原子筆 + 左至右的書寫方式. (6) [Slogan]: 印得到處都是. (7) [Slogan]: 反向湯勺. (8) [Subtitle]: 左撇子只能硬倒. (9) [Slogan]: 吃飯時 隔壁的右撇子.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator throughout, 1 male dining partner appearing at the end.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair tied in a high bun, wearing a cream and grey sporty zip-up jacket and grey sweatpants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a home office setup with wooden drawers, a router, Sony boxes, and a Nintendo Switch dock. Second scene is a buffet or kitchen area with metallic pots and food containers. Third scene is a dining room with a bookshelf and a Silver Play Button on display.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, comedic piano-driven background track featuring a steady electronic beat. No human speech is present. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as the variety text appears on screen, highlighting the visual discomfort. The music maintains a constant tempo. (3) A distinct 'pop' or bubble sound effect coincides with the appearance of new slogan text. The acoustic environment is clean with no background room tone. (4) A whimsical, slightly descending cartoonish sound effect plays when the woman struggles with the ladle. (5) A sharp 'error' or buzz-like sound effect occurs exactly when the two characters' elbows collide, emphasizing the social awkwardness.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem A -> Problem B -> Problem C
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously illustrate the common physical and social inconveniences faced by left-handed individuals in a world designed for right-handed people, such as smudging ink, using asymmetric tools, and bumping elbows at dining tables.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a relatable POV format to build empathy and humor around left-handedness. The fast editing and bright lighting align with social media trends.
